form.label: OAI-to-Circuit Token Usage Dashboard
form.description: Token usage analytics and predictions for LLM API usage

search.query: index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | eval normalized_model=lower(model) | eval normalized_model=case( normalized_model=="gpt-4o mini", "gpt-4o-mini", normalized_model=="gpt-4.1 mini", "gpt-4.1-mini", normalized_model=="gpt-5 mini", "gpt-5-mini", normalized_model=="gpt-5 nano", "gpt-5-nano", normalized_model=="gpt-5 chat", "gpt-5-chat", normalized_model=="gpt-o4-mini" OR normalized_model=="gpt-o4 mini", "o4-mini", normalized_model=="gpt-o3" OR normalized_model=="gpt o3", "o3", normalized_model=="gemini 2.5 pro exp" OR normalized_model=="gemini-2.5-pro-exp", "gemini-2.5-pro", normalized_model=="gemini 2.5 flash preview" OR normalized_model=="gemini-2.5-flash-preview", "gemini-2.5-flash", normalized_model=="gemini 3.1 flash lite", "gemini-3.1-flash-lite", normalized_model=="gemini 3.1 pro", "gemini-3.1-pro", normalized_model=="claude sonnet 4", "claude-sonnet-4", normalized_model=="claude sonnet 4.5" OR normalized_model=="claude-sonnet-4.5", "claude-sonnet-4-5", normalized_model=="claude opus 4.1" OR normalized_model=="claude-opus-4.1", "claude-opus-4-1", normalized_model=="claude opus 4.5" OR normalized_model=="claude-opus-4.5", "claude-opus-4-5", normalized_model=="claude opus 4.6" OR normalized_model=="claude-opus-4.6", "claude-opus-4-6", normalized_model=="claude haiku 4.5" OR normalized_model=="claude-haiku-4.5", "claude-haiku-4-5", 1==1, normalized_model) | eval input_price_per_million=case( normalized_model=="gpt-4o-mini", 0.165, normalized_model=="gpt-4o", 2.75, normalized_model=="gpt-4.1", 2.00, normalized_model=="gpt-4.1-mini", 0.40, normalized_model=="o4-mini", 1.10, normalized_model=="o3", 2.00, normalized_model=="gpt-5", 1.375, normalized_model=="gpt-5-2", 1.75, normalized_model=="gpt-5-4", 2.50, normalized_model=="gpt-5-4-mini", 0.75, normalized_model=="gpt-5-4-nano", 0.20, normalized_model=="gpt-5-mini", 0.25, normalized_model=="gpt-5-nano", 0.055, normalized_model=="gpt-5-chat", 1.25, normalized_model=="gemini-2.5-pro" AND prompt_tokens > 200000, 2.50, normalized_model=="gemini-2.5-pro", 1.25, normalized_model=="gemini-2.5-flash", 0.30, normalized_model=="gemini-3-flash", 0.50, normalized_model=="gemini-3.1-flash-lite", 0.25, normalized_model=="gemini-3.1-pro" AND prompt_tokens > 200000, 4.00, normalized_model=="gemini-3.1-pro", 2.00, normalized_model=="gemini-2.5-pro-web-search" AND prompt_tokens > 200000, 2.50, normalized_model=="gemini-2.5-pro-web-search", 1.25, normalized_model=="gemini-2.5-flash-web-search", 0.30, normalized_model=="gemini-3-pro-web-search" AND prompt_tokens > 200000, 4.00, normalized_model=="gemini-3-pro-web-search", 2.00, normalized_model=="gemini-3.1-flash-lite-web-search", 0.25, normalized_model=="gemini-3.1-pro-web-search" AND prompt_tokens > 200000, 4.00, normalized_model=="gemini-3.1-pro-web-search", 2.00, normalized_model=="claude-sonnet-4", 6.00, normalized_model=="claude-sonnet-4-5", 6.60, normalized_model=="claude-opus-4-1", 15.00, normalized_model=="claude-opus-4-5", 5.00, normalized_model=="claude-opus-4-6", 5.00, normalized_model=="claude-haiku-4-5", 1.10, 1==1, 0) | eval completion_price_per_million=case( normalized_model=="gpt-4o-mini", 0.66, normalized_model=="gpt-4o", 11.00, normalized_model=="gpt-4.1", 8.00, normalized_model=="gpt-4.1-mini", 1.60, normalized_model=="o4-mini", 4.40, normalized_model=="o3", 8.00, normalized_model=="gpt-5", 11.00, normalized_model=="gpt-5-2", 14.00, normalized_model=="gpt-5-4", 15.00, normalized_model=="gpt-5-4-mini", 4.15, normalized_model=="gpt-5-4-nano", 1.25, normalized_model=="gpt-5-mini", 2.00, normalized_model=="gpt-5-nano", 0.44, normalized_model=="gpt-5-chat", 10.00, normalized_model=="gemini-2.5-pro" AND prompt_tokens > 200000, 15.00, normalized_model=="gemini-2.5-pro", 10.00, normalized_model=="gemini-2.5-flash", 2.50, normalized_model=="gemini-3-flash", 3.00, normalized_model=="gemini-3.1-flash-lite", 1.50, normalized_model=="gemini-3.1-pro" AND prompt_tokens > 200000, 18.00, normalized_model=="gemini-3.1-pro", 12.00, normalized_model=="gemini-2.5-pro-web-search" AND prompt_tokens > 200000, 15.00, normalized_model=="gemini-2.5-pro-web-search", 10.00, normalized_model=="gemini-2.5-flash-web-search", 2.50, normalized_model=="gemini-3-pro-web-search" AND prompt_tokens > 200000, 18.00, normalized_model=="gemini-3-pro-web-search", 12.00, normalized_model=="gemini-3.1-flash-lite-web-search", 1.50, normalized_model=="gemini-3.1-pro-web-search" AND prompt_tokens > 200000, 18.00, normalized_model=="gemini-3.1-pro-web-search", 12.00, normalized_model=="claude-sonnet-4", 22.50, normalized_model=="claude-sonnet-4-5", 24.75, normalized_model=="claude-opus-4-1", 75.00, normalized_model=="claude-opus-4-5", 25.00, normalized_model=="claude-opus-4-6", 25.00, normalized_model=="claude-haiku-4-5", 5.50, 1==1, 0) | eval request_surcharge_per_1k=case( normalized_model=="gemini-2.5-pro-web-search", 35.00, normalized_model=="gemini-2.5-flash-web-search", 25.00, normalized_model=="gemini-3-pro-web-search", 14.00, normalized_model=="gemini-3.1-flash-lite-web-search", 14.00, normalized_model=="gemini-3.1-pro-web-search", 14.00, 1==1, 0) | eval calculated_cost=(prompt_tokens/1000000*input_price_per_million)+(completion_tokens/1000000*completion_price_per_million)+((coalesce(requests, 1))/1000*request_surcharge_per_1k) | eval cost=coalesce(estimated_cost_usd, calculated_cost)
index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | stats sum(total_tokens) as total_tokens | eval total_tokens=tostring(total_tokens, "commas")
| stats sum(cost) as total_cost | eval total_cost="$" + tostring(round(total_cost, 2), "commas")
index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | stats sum(requests) as requests | eval requests=tostring(requests, "commas")
index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | stats sum(total_tokens) as total_tokens count as num_requests | eval avg_tokens=round(total_tokens/num_requests, 0) | fields avg_tokens

index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | eval normalized_subkey=if(match(subkey, "^sha256:"), subkey, "sha256:" + substr(sha256(subkey), 1, 16)) | eval grouping_key=coalesce(email, normalized_subkey) | stats dc(grouping_key) as unique_users

index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | stats sum(total_tokens) as "Total Tokens" sum(prompt_tokens) as "Prompt Tokens" sum(completion_tokens) as "Completion Tokens" by model | rename model as "Model" | table "Model" "Total Tokens" "Prompt Tokens" "Completion Tokens" | sort - "Total Tokens"

index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | eval normalized_subkey=if(match(subkey, "^sha256:"), subkey, "sha256:" + substr(sha256(subkey), 1, 16)) | eval grouping_key=coalesce(email, normalized_subkey) | stats sum(total_tokens) as total_tokens_raw sum(requests) as requests_raw dc(model) as model_count dc(normalized_subkey) as key_count values(friendly_name) as friendly_name values(email) as email by grouping_key | eval has_name=if(isnotnull(friendly_name), "Yes", "No") | eval display_name=case( isnotnull(friendly_name) AND isnotnull(email), friendly_name + " <" + email + ">", isnotnull(friendly_name), friendly_name, isnotnull(email), email, match(grouping_key, "^sha256:"), "User-" + substr(grouping_key, 8, 16), 1==1, grouping_key ) | eval "Avg Tokens/Req"=round(total_tokens_raw/requests_raw, 2) | eval "Requests"=tostring(requests_raw, "commas") | eval "Keys"=key_count | sort - total_tokens_raw | rename display_name as "User" has_name as "Has Name" model_count as "Models Used" total_tokens_raw as "Total Tokens" | fieldformat "Total Tokens"=tostring('Total Tokens', "commas") | table "User" "Total Tokens" "Requests" "Models Used" "Keys" "Avg Tokens/Req" "Has Name" | head 20

panel.title: Cumulative Prompt vs Completion Tokens with Forecast

search.query: index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | timechart span=1h sum(prompt_tokens) as prompt_tokens sum(completion_tokens) as completion_tokens | accum prompt_tokens as "Cumulative Prompt" | accum completion_tokens as "Cumulative Completion" | predict "Cumulative Prompt" as pred_prompt future_timespan=6 algorithm=LLT suppress=true | predict "Cumulative Completion" as pred_completion future_timespan=6 algorithm=LLT suppress=true

index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | timechart span=1h sum(total_tokens) as hourly_tokens | accum hourly_tokens as "Cumulative Tokens" | predict "Cumulative Tokens" future_timespan=2 algorithm=LLT suppress=true
index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | timechart span=1h sum(total_tokens) as tokens | predict tokens future_timespan=6 algorithm=LL suppress=true
index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | timechart span=1h count as requests | predict requests future_timespan=6 algorithm=LL suppress=true

panel.title: Cumulative Token Usage with Forecast (Alt View)

search.query: index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | timechart span=1h sum(total_tokens) as tokens | accum tokens as "Cumulative Tokens" | predict "Cumulative Tokens" future_timespan=6 algorithm=LL suppress=true

index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | eval normalized_subkey=if(match(subkey, "^sha256:"), subkey, "sha256:" + substr(sha256(subkey), 1, 16)) | eval grouping_key=coalesce(email, normalized_subkey) | stats sum(total_tokens) as total_tokens_raw sum(requests) as requests_raw sum(prompt_tokens) as prompt_tokens_raw sum(completion_tokens) as completion_tokens_raw dc(normalized_subkey) as key_count values(friendly_name) as friendly_name values(email) as email by grouping_key | eval display_name=case( isnotnull(friendly_name) AND isnotnull(email), friendly_name + " <" + email + ">", isnotnull(friendly_name), friendly_name, isnotnull(email), email, match(grouping_key, "^sha256:"), "User-" + substr(grouping_key, 8, 16), 1==1, grouping_key ) | eval "Avg Tokens/Request"=round(total_tokens_raw/requests_raw, 2) | eval "Total Tokens"=tostring(total_tokens_raw, "commas") | eval "Requests"=tostring(requests_raw, "commas") | eval "Prompt Tokens"=tostring(prompt_tokens_raw, "commas") | eval "Completion Tokens"=tostring(completion_tokens_raw, "commas") | eval "Keys"=key_count | rename display_name as "User" | table "User" "Total Tokens" "Requests" "Prompt Tokens" "Completion Tokens" "Keys" "Avg Tokens/Request" | sort - total_tokens_raw | fields - total_tokens_raw requests_raw prompt_tokens_raw completion_tokens_raw key_count | head 10
index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | stats sum(total_tokens) as total_tokens by model
index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | eval hour=strftime(_time, "%H") | stats sum(total_tokens) as total_tokens by hour | sort hour
index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | timechart span=1d sum(total_tokens) as "Total Tokens" sum(requests) as "Requests"
index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | timechart span=1h count(eval(success==1 OR success=="true")) as "Successful" count(eval(success==0 OR success=="false")) as "Failed"
index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage:error" | stats count by error_type error_message | sort - count

index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | eval timestamp=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval normalized_subkey=if(match(subkey, "^sha256:"), subkey, "sha256:" + substr(sha256(subkey), 1, 16)) | eval display_name=case( isnotnull(friendly_name) AND isnotnull(email), friendly_name + " <" + email + ">", isnotnull(friendly_name), friendly_name, 1==1, "User-" + substr(normalized_subkey, 8, 16) ) | table timestamp display_name model total_tokens prompt_tokens completion_tokens requests status_code success | rename display_name as "User" | sort - timestamp | head 50
index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | eval has_name=if(isnotnull(friendly_name), "With Name", "Without Name") | stats sum(total_tokens) as total_tokens by has_name
| stats sum(cost) as cost by model | eval cost=round(cost, 4) | sort -cost
| timechart span=1h sum(cost) as hourly_cost | eval hourly_cost=round(hourly_cost, 4)

| eval normalized_subkey=if(match(subkey, "^sha256:"), subkey, "sha256:" + substr(sha256(subkey), 1, 16)) | eval grouping_key=coalesce(email, normalized_subkey) | stats sum(cost) as total_cost, sum(total_tokens) as tokens, sum(requests) as requests, dc(normalized_subkey) as key_count, values(friendly_name) as friendly_name, values(email) as email by grouping_key | eval display_name=case( isnotnull(friendly_name) AND isnotnull(email), friendly_name + " <" + email + ">", isnotnull(friendly_name), friendly_name, isnotnull(email), email, match(grouping_key, "^sha256:"), "User-" + substr(grouping_key, 8, 16), 1==1, grouping_key ) | eval total_cost="$" + tostring(round(total_cost, 4), "commas") | eval tokens=tostring(tokens, "commas") | eval keys=key_count | sort -total_cost | head 10 | rename display_name as "User", total_cost as "Total Cost", tokens as "Tokens", requests as "Requests", keys as "Keys" | table "User" "Total Cost" "Tokens" "Requests" "Keys"
index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | eval request_type=if(is_streaming=true, "Streaming", "Non-Streaming") | stats sum(requests) as count by request_type
index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" | eval request_type=if(is_streaming=true, "Streaming", "Non-Streaming") | stats sum(total_tokens) as total_tokens by request_type
| eval request_type=if(is_streaming=true, "Streaming", "Non-Streaming") | stats sum(cost) as cost by request_type | eval cost=round(cost, 4)
| timechart span=1d sum(cost) as daily_cost | eval daily_cost=round(daily_cost, 2)

panel.title: Average Cost per Request by Model

search.query: | stats sum(cost) as total_cost, sum(requests) as total_requests by model | eval avg_cost_per_request=total_cost/total_requests | eval avg_cost_per_request="$" + tostring(round(avg_cost_per_request, 6), "commas") | eval total_cost="$" + tostring(round(total_cost, 2), "commas") | sort -total_cost | rename model as "Model", total_cost as "Total Cost", total_requests as "Requests", avg_cost_per_request as "Avg Cost/Request"
index=oai_circuit sourcetype="llm:usage" circuit_rate_limits=* | head 1 | spath input=circuit_rate_limits | table _time circuit_rate_limits* | rename circuit_rate_limits as "Rate Limit Data"

ul.li: Cost Tracking: Estimated API costs based on token usage and model pricing
Streaming Analysis: Breakdown of streaming vs non-streaming requests
Rate Limit Monitoring: Circuit API rate limit status (if available)
Enhanced Metrics: Cost per request, cost by user, and cost projections
Key Rotation Support: Users with rotated keys are aggregated by email for reporting continuity

p.i: Note: Cost estimates are based on the bridge's configured vendor pricing for OpenAI, Gemini, and Claude models and may not match Circuit billing exactly. Update pricing in pricing.py and this dashboard reference as needed.

Key Rotation: When keys are rotated, usage from all keys (old and new) is aggregated by email address. The "Keys" column shows how many keys a user has had. System events without email addresses are grouped by subkey.

p.b: Default pricing tiers for available models:

tr.td: $0 quarterly; pricing sheet marks removal in Mar 2026
$0 quarterly; pricing sheet marks removal in Mar 2026
Based on usage; pricing sheet marks removal in Mar 2026
Gemini 3 Pro (removed; no active invoke value)

p.i: Note: This reference table mirrors the bridge pricing configuration for active or explicitly tracked models. Free tier models include monthly token allowances, Gemini threshold models switch to higher pricing above 200K prompt tokens, and web-search variants add the listed per-1K-request surcharge. Deprecated or removed statuses reflect the supplied pricing sheet.
